name: 16q12_SD_blocks
description: 16q12.1-q12.2 SD modules — LCR16a-derived duplicons inserted distal to the pericentromere; cluster around CYLD, NKD1, SALL1 and the GPR114 area. Source of rare ~1 Mb 16q12 microdeletions.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of LCR16a-related duplicons interspersed with unique sequence; SDs typically 30-150 kb at ~95-98% identity; some inverted relative to LCR16a consensus.
